subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath been fulfilled, and the Promised One hath appeared, when the Trump was sounded and eyes were transfixed in wonder. Say: This is the Day wherein it hath been opened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و ظهر الموعود اذ صاح الصور و شاخصت الابصار قل هذا یوم قد فتح فیه
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @prophecy and fulfillment
